name_en: 🆕 M12656 Green! BRAZZA Wallet. Crafted from Monogram Heritage canvas, this Brazza wallet showcases Pharrell Williams' fresh take on the iconic Monogram pattern. Interwoven textures and the Marque L.Vuitton Déposée label highlight classic Damier elements, paired with multiple card slots and compartments for a functional long design.
name_cn:
🆕 M12656 Green! BRAZZA Wallet. Crafted from Monogram Heritage canvas, this Brazza wallet showcases Pharrell Williams' fresh take on the iconic Monogram pattern. Interwoven textures and the Marque L.Vuitton Déposée label highlight classic Damier elements, paired with multiple card slots and compartments for a functional long design.
